installCommand: rm -rf node_modules && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@11.1.3 --activate && pnpm config set registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && pnpm run preflight:interference && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false
buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@11.1.3 --activate && pnpm run build
